languages.text: {n}Ужасающий конструкт недвижим — тяжелые обломки надежно прижимают машину к холодному полу. Однако от одного взгляда на столь омерзительное творение мурашки сами непроизвольно ползут по спине.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Орудие боли придавлено тяжелыми обломками. От одного взгляда на это чудовище пробирает дрожь.{/n}
{n}Ужасающий конструкт недвижим — тяжелые обломки надежно прижимают машину к холодному полу. Однако от одного взгляда на столь омерзительное творение мурашки сами непроизвольно ползут по спине.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ужасающий конструкт недвижим — тяжелые обломки надежно прижимают машину к холодному полу. Однако от одного взгляда на столь омерзительное творение мурашки сами непроизвольно ползут по спине.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}
{n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}
{n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das furchterregende Konstrukt ist unbeweglich — die schweren Trümmer haben die Maschine fest auf dem kalten Boden fixiert. Und doch reicht ein einziger Blick auf das ekelhafte Ding, um eine Gänsehaut zu bekommen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La terrifiante construction est immobile — les lourds débris ont fermement fixé la machine sur un sol froid. Et pourtant, un seul regard sur cette chose répugnante suffit à vous donner la chair de poule.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这台可怕的机器一动不动--沉重的碎片将它牢牢地固定在冰冷的地板上。然而，只要看一眼这个恶心的东西，就足以让人毛骨悚然。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La aterradora construcción está inmóvil: los pesados escombros han inmovilizado firmemente la máquina contra el frío suelo. Y, sin embargo, una sola mirada a esa cosa repugnante basta para erizar la piel.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}重い瓦礫が冷たい床にしっかりと固定されている。それなのに、その醜悪なものをひと目見ただけで、肌がゾッとする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Korkunç yapı hareketsiz — ağır enkaz makineyi soğuk zemine sıkıca sabitlemiş. Yine de bu iğrenç şeye tek bir bakış bile tüylerinizi diken diken etmeye yetiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The terrifying construct is motionless — the heavy debris has firmly pinned the machine to a cold floor. And yet a single look at the disgusting thing is enough to make your skin crawl.{/n}
